/usr/bin/ar qc libNovaPitch_WebUI.a CMakeFiles/NovaPitch_WebUI.dir/juce_binarydata_NovaPitch_WebUI/JuceLibraryCode/BinaryData1.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NovaPitch_WebUI.dir/juce_binarydata_NovaPitch_WebUI/JuceLibraryCode/BinaryData2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NovaPitch_WebUI.dir/juce_binarydata_NovaPitch_WebUI/JuceLibraryCode/BinaryData3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NovaPitch_WebUI.dir/juce_binarydata_NovaPitch_WebUI/JuceLibraryCode/BinaryData4.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NovaPitch_WebUI.dir/juce_binarydata_NovaPitch_WebUI/JuceLibraryCode/BinaryData5.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NovaPitch_WebUI.dir/juce_binarydata_NovaPitch_WebUI/JuceLibraryCode/BinaryData6.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libNovaPitch_WebUI.a
